g.text: Beta distribution is used in TurboQuant to model coordinate distributions after random rotation.

text.style: font-style: italic; font-size: 10px; font-family: 'Microsoft YaHei', 'Microsoft JhengHei', 'SimHei', 'Segoe UI', 'Arial Unicode MS', 'DejaVu Sans', sans-serif; fill: #808080

g.text: TurboQuant 使用 Beta 分佈來建模隨機旋轉後的座標分佈。
